final:
module eeprom_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we,         // write enable
    input wire [7:0] data_in, // data input
    output reg [7:0] data_out // data output
);
    // Internal register to store the data
    reg [7:0] eeprom_data;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            eeprom_data <= data_in; // Write data to eeprom_data
        end
        data_out <= eeprom_data; // Read data from eeprom_data
    end
endmodule
